full_description: Inspect two gray blocks' hidden backside colors and place each block on the matching colored pad; both blocks may match the same pad.
schema: {A} denotes the two gray backside-marked blocks, {B} denotes the colored pads, {C} denotes the inspected backside colors, {a} denotes the arm used
preference: Mention that both backside colors must be inspected and matched to pads.
seen: Use {a} to inspect {A} and place each on its matching pad.
Check both blocks' hidden back colors, then match them to {B}.
Reveal the backside colors and put each gray block on the corresponding pad.
Sort the two blocks by their hidden back colors.
unseen: Inspect the backs of two blocks and match them to pads.
Move each gray block to the pad matching its backside color.
Use hidden backside colors to place the two blocks.

seen: pick up one gray block with {a}
inspect the carried block's backside color
place that block on the matching pad
unseen: match the block to its color pad
